project.name: Axolotl
project.tagline: "Рисуй логику, а не пиши её" — visual OS for AI agents
project.philosophy: "Ловушка чтобы удержать человека в процессе" — human stays in the loop

phase4_memory.description: MemPalace integration — key differentiator from n8n/LangFlow

visual_memory.name: Memory Graph View
visual_memory.source: Vladimir's idea: 'чисто поглядеть что с чем сейчас связано'
tasks: Show Wings/Rooms as graph nodes — DONE (wing cards + room list)
Visualize Tunnels as connections between wings — DONE (tunnels section)
Highlight found nodes during search — DONE (via MemoryNode search)
Click node → view original Drawer content — DONE (drawer modal)

graph_memory.name: Graph-based memory instead of RAG
graph_memory.source: Vladimir's idea: 'возвращаем ноду и её метаданные — кто, с кем связана, на каком уровне вложенности'
tasks: Search results return as temporary canvas cards — DONE (MemoryResultCard + WorkflowCanvas wiring)
Navigate from card to connected nodes via tunnels — DONE (tunnels → click → load drawers)
AI receives graph structure as context, not raw chunks — DONE (enhanced buildGraphContext + getNavigationContext)
Store learned procedures as Skills (not just facts) — DONE (Skill model + SkillService)

needs_wiring: Agents automatically receive memory context before execution — DONE (searchForContext in SchemaService)
Auto-save agent results to MemPalace after execution — DONE (addDrawer after agent execution)
Schema versioning → save each change to memory — DONE (updateSchema saves to MemPalace)

advanced_nodes.subagent: done (purple) — execute nested workflows with input/output mapping

done: Token streaming via WebSocket (Ollama streams NDJSON → tokens → WS → canvas)
Pass upstream results to downstream agents (context window)
Context compression for long chains (MAX_CONTEXT_CHARS → LLM summary)
Zoom to node — double-click → fitView animation
Metrics — nodes/sec, elapsed time, avg node time

needs_work: Link tasks to nodes — nodeId field exists, highlight button exists, needs full wiring

done: Python export — generate script from schema

tasks: Webhook Node (HTTP → execution) — webhook node type exists
Schedule Node (cron) — schedule node type exists
Electron main process with window management
Application menu (File, Edit, View, Window, Help)
IPC bridge via preload script (secure context isolation)

done: Backend unit tests (5 classes): SchemaServiceTest, LlmServiceTest, JwtUtilTest, AgentControllerTest, ExecutionWebSocketHandlerTest
Frontend unit tests (8 components): AgentNode, SourceNode, OutputNode, MemoryNode, HumanNode, ExecutionPanel, schemaStore, authStore

completed_this_session: Memory wiring: agents auto-receive memory context (searchForContext) + auto-save results (addDrawer)
Memory Graph View panel (MemoryGraphView.vue) — wings, rooms, drawers, tunnels visualization
Backend memory API: /api/memory/taxonomy, /api/memory/drawers, /api/memory/tunnels
MemPalaceClient extended: getTaxonomy(), listDrawers(), findTunnels()
Zoom to node: double-click → fitView animation (all node types)
GroupNode: parentId → parentNode mapping fixed for Vue Flow
Verified: token streaming fully wired (Ollama → WS → canvas real-time tokens)
Verified: auth fully wired (login → token → interceptor → router guard)
Verified: group creation UI exists (select 2+ nodes → 📦 Группа)
Verified: execution metrics exist (nodes/sec, elapsed, avg node time, token count)
Verified: auto-save agent results to MemPalace after execution
Fixed: TypeScript errors in schemaStore.test.ts
Removed OpenClaw integration — Axolotl already implements stateful agent via canvas architecture
Raised Skills priority to MEDIUM — auto-learning replaces OpenClaw tool-use paradigm
Execution Modes (HIGH): EXECUTE/ANALYZE/DRY_RUN — mode selector in toolbar, passed to API
Remote Management API (HIGH): /api/remote/* with API keys, rate limiting (60 req/min)
Subagent Node (HIGH): subagent type + SubagentNode.vue + executeSubagentNode
Integration tests (HIGH): Testcontainers + SchemaControllerIntegrationTest
E2E tests (HIGH): Playwright config + app.spec.ts
CI/CD (MEDIUM): GitHub Actions workflow (backend, frontend, e2e, docker)
Skills (MEDIUM): Skill model + SkillService with auto-learning + SkillController
OpenAPI/Swagger (MEDIUM): springdoc-openapi + OpenApiConfig
Custom LLM Endpoints (P2): CustomLlmEndpoint model + CustomLlmProvider + endpoint controller
Share Links (P2): ShareLink model + ShareController for read-only sharing
LLM Cross-check (P1): CrossCheckService + CrossCheckController for output verification
Prometheus Metrics (LOW): MetricsService with Micrometer for workflow/node/LLM metrics
Structured Logging (LOW): SLF4J + logback-spring.xml with file rotation
Schema Versioning (DONE): Auto-save to MemPalace on updateSchema
Memory Result Cards (DONE): Search results as draggable floating cards on canvas
Graph Context (P1): Enhanced buildGraphContext with tree structure + getNavigationContext for traversal
Desktop App (P3): Electron main/preload + tray + menu + shortcuts + notifications + auto-update

differentiators.infinite_zoom_to_chat: Axolotl: true | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.long_term_memory_mempalace: Axolotl: true (graph structure as context) | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.memory_visualization_as_graph: Axolotl: done | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.graph_as_context: Axolotl: structured graph + navigation | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.token_streaming_realtime: Axolotl: done (Ollama) | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.built_in_plan_todo: Axolotl: true | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.local_first_privacy: Axolotl: true | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.human_in_the_loop_as_core: Axolotl: true | n8n: basic | LangFlow: basic
differentiators.execution_modes: Axolotl: EXECUTE/ANALYZE/DRY_RUN | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.subagent_workflows: Axolotl: nested workflow execution | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.auto_learning_skills: Axolotl: skill tracking + success rate | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.remote_api: Axolotl: API keys + rate limiting | n8n: true | LangFlow: false
differentiators.llm_crosscheck: Axolotl: verify with second LLM | n8n: false | LangFlow: false
differentiators.custom_llm_endpoints: Axolotl: add custom OpenAI-compatible | n8n: true | LangFlow: false
differentiators.share_links: Axolotl: read-only share | n8n: true | LangFlow: false
differentiators.prometheus_metrics: Axolotl: Micrometer + Prometheus | n8n: true | LangFlow: false
differentiators.desktop_app: Axolotl: Electron with tray + shortcuts | n8n: true | LangFlow: false

notes_from_vladimir_discussion.quote: Графовая тема может быть лучше — возвращаем ноду и её метаданные. ИИ может понять что это нужно и запросить ближайшие ноды
notes_from_vladimir_discussion.conclusion: MemoryNode should return structured data with graph navigation, not raw text chunks
notes_from_vladimir_discussion.status: Partially done — Memory Graph View shows wings/rooms/drawers/tunnels, graph-as-context still needs work

notes_from_vladimir_discussion.quote: Skill — это не промт юзера, а выученная последовательность в результате проб и ошибок
notes_from_vladimir_discussion.conclusion: Future: auto-learning system — AI remembers successful patterns and turns them into reusable skills
notes_from_vladimir_discussion.status: Done — Skill model + SkillService with usage tracking + success rate

notes_from_vladimir_discussion.quote: Визуально мапы из документов это скучно, а графы это круто
notes_from_vladimir_discussion.conclusion: Memory GUI is mandatory, not optional — users must see their knowledge structure
notes_from_vladimir_discussion.status: Done — MemoryGraphView.vue with wing cards, room list, drawer cards, tunnel navigation

new_features_this_session.remote_api: POST /api/remote/workflows/{id}/run + API key auth + rate limiting
new_features_this_session.subagent_node: Execute nested workflows with input/output mapping, max 5 levels depth
new_features_this_session.ci_cd: GitHub Actions: backend compile, frontend type-check, tests, docker build
new_features_this_session.skills_system: Auto-learning with usage tracking + success rate per skill
new_features_this_session.custom_llm_endpoints: Add OpenAI-compatible custom LLM endpoints via /api/settings/endpoints
new_features_this_session.share_links: Read-only shareable links via /api/share with expiration support
new_features_this_session.llm_crosscheck: Verify agent output with second LLM via /api/crosscheck
new_features_this_session.schema_versioning: Auto-save schema versions to MemPalace on update
new_features_this_session.memory_result_cards: Search results shown as draggable floating cards on canvas
new_features_this_session.desktop_app: Electron app with tray, menu, shortcuts, notifications, auto-update
